heading: Today
text: Periods of clouds and sun. Warm.

heading: Friday Night
text: Periods of clouds, and quite mild.  A chance of showers north late.

heading: Saturday
text: Showers and storms likely north, a rising chance south.
temperature: Mid 70s to mid 80s, north to south

heading: Sunday
text: Showers likely, diminishing north after noon. Cooler.
temperature: Mid 60s to mid 70s north to south
